title: Wireless Bluetooth Headphones
description: Premium noise-cancelling wireless headphones with 30-hour battery life. Features advanced Bluetooth 5.0 technology, comfortable over-ear design, and crystal-clear audio quality. Perfect for music lovers and professionals.

title: Smart Fitness Watch
description: Track your fitness goals with this advanced smartwatch. Features heart rate monitoring, GPS tracking, sleep analysis, and 50+ sport modes. Water-resistant up to 50m with 7-day battery life.

title: Professional Camera Lens
description: High-quality 50mm f/1.8 prime lens for DSLR cameras. Delivers stunning bokeh and exceptional low-light performance. Perfect for portraits, street photography, and creative work.

title: Ergonomic Office Chair
description: Premium ergonomic office chair with lumbar support and adjustable armrests. Features breathable mesh back, 360-degree swivel, and height adjustment. Designed for all-day comfort and productivity.

title: Stainless Steel Water Bottle
description: Insulated stainless steel water bottle keeps drinks cold for 24 hours or hot for 12 hours. BPA-free, leak-proof design with wide mouth for easy cleaning. Available in 32oz capacity.

title: Mechanical Gaming Keyboard
description: RGB backlit mechanical gaming keyboard with customizable keys and anti-ghosting technology. Features durable mechanical switches, programmable macros, and ergonomic wrist rest.

title: Yoga Mat with Carrying Strap
description: Premium non-slip yoga mat made from eco-friendly TPE material. Extra thick 6mm cushioning provides comfort and support. Includes carrying strap and storage bag.

title: Portable Bluetooth Speaker
description: Waterproof portable Bluetooth speaker with 360-degree sound. Features 20-hour battery life, USB-C charging, and built-in microphone for hands-free calls. Perfect for outdoor adventures.

title: Cotton Bed Sheet Set
description: Luxury 100% Egyptian cotton bed sheet set. Includes fitted sheet, flat sheet, and two pillowcases. Soft, breathable, and wrinkle-resistant. Available in Queen size.

title: Stainless Steel Cookware Set
description: Professional 10-piece stainless steel cookware set. Includes pots, pans, and lids. Features tri-ply construction for even heat distribution. Oven-safe up to 500°F and dishwasher safe.

title: LED Desk Lamp
description: Modern LED desk lamp with adjustable brightness and color temperature. Features USB charging port, touch controls, and flexible gooseneck design. Energy-efficient and eye-friendly.

title: Running Shoes
description: Lightweight running shoes with responsive cushioning and breathable mesh upper. Features durable rubber outsole with excellent traction. Designed for comfort during long-distance runs.
